payload.title: One-command plain-Rust → dialect migration (whole-workspace `trust fix`)
payload.description: The core adoption barrier: converting an existing crate to the dialect means rewriting every multi-arg call to named-arg syntax across the whole workspace (the reviewer's pilot file was 100% R0042). Today `trust fix` is single-file + in-crate (+ manual TRUST_SIGNATURE_PATH). Build a `trust fix` that walks a crate/workspace, resolves callees across modules and crates, and rewrites all positional calls to named-arg form in one shot — turning 'adopt the dialect' from days of hand-edits into one command. Elevates the RT-106 remaining-depth note.
